glosses.ar: أخ بالزواج; أخ من زواج الأم/الأب
glosses.ja: 義理の兄弟; 継兄弟

translations.vi: Anh rể của tôi sắp đến.
translations.hi: मेरा जीजा जल्द आ रहा है.
translations.id: Saudara ipar saya akan segera datang.
translations.ja: 義理の兄がもうすぐ来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun; introduces the NP.
Compound common noun (masculine singular); head of the noun phrase.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.

translations.en: Our brother-in-law is preparing the barbecue.
translations.es: Nuestro cuñado está preparando la barbacoa.
translations.de: Unser Schwager bereitet den Grill vor.
translations.it: Il nostro cognato sta preparando il barbecue.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们姐夫正在准备烧烤。
translations.yue: 我哋姐夫正在準備燒烤。
translations.pt: Nosso cunhado está preparando o churrasco.
translations.vi: Anh rể của chúng tôi đang chuẩn bị tiệc nướng.
translations.nl: Onze zwager maakt de barbecue klaar.
translations.hu: A sógorunk készíti elő a grillt.
translations.hi: हमारे जीजा बारबेक्यू तैयार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο κουνιάδος μας ετοιμάζει το μπάρμπεκιου.
translations.id: Saudara ipar kami sedang menyiapkan barbekyu.
translations.ja: 私たちの義理の兄がバーベキューの準備をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; singular noun possessed by a plural speaker group.
Compound common noun (masculine singular); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the object NP.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Je dois appeler mon beau-frère aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa zaple mɔ̃ bo fʁɛʁ oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Je dois appeler mon beau-frère aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa zaple mɔ̃ bo fʁɛʁ oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: I have to call my brother-in-law today.
translations.es: Tengo que llamar a mi cuñado hoy.
translations.de: Ich muss heute meinen Schwager anrufen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天得给我姐夫打电话。
translations.pt: Tenho que ligar para o meu cunhado hoje.
translations.he: אני צריך להתקשר לגיס שלי היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải gọi cho anh rể.
translations.nl: Ik moet vandaag mijn zwager bellen.
translations.hu: Ma fel kell hívnom a sógoromat.
translations.hi: मुझे आज अपने जीजा को फोन करना है.
translations.pl: Muszę dziś zadzwonić do mojego szwagra.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καλέσω τον κουνιάδο μου σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg må ringe svogeren min i dag.
translations.id: Saya harus menelepon saudara ipar saya hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste ringa min svåger idag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-l sun pe cumnatul meu astăzi.
translations.da: Jeg skal ringe til min svoger i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は義理の兄に電話しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Finite verb expressing obligation, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'devoir'.
Possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun; introduces the object NP.
Compound common noun (masculine singular); direct object of the infinitive.
Temporal adverb modifying the verbal predicate.

sentences.target: Tu conduis chez ton beau-frère ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ̃dɥi ʃe tɔ̃ bo fʁɛʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu conduis chez ton beau-frère ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ̃dɥi ʃe tɔ̃ bo fʁɛʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re driving to your brother-in-law’s tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche conduces a casa de tu cuñado.
translations.de: Du fährst heute Abend zu deinem Schwager.
translations.it: Stasera guidi a casa di tuo cognato.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 형부 집으로 차를 몰고 가.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚你开车去你姐夫家。
translations.yue: 你今晚揸車去你姐夫屋企。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером ты поедешь к шурину.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite você vai dirigir até a casa do seu cunhado.
translations.he: הלילה אתה נוהג לבית של הגיס שלך.
translations.tr: Bu akşam kayınbiraderinin evine arabayla gidiyorsun.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn lái xe đến nhà anh rể của bạn.
translations.nl: Vanavond rijd je naar je zwager.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ти їдеш до шваґера.
translations.hu: Ma este autóval mész a sógorodhoz.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम अपने जीजा के घर गाड़ी चलाकर जा रहे हो.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem jedziesz do domu swojego szwagra.
translations.el: Απόψε οδηγείς στο σπίτι του κουνιάδου σου.
translations.nb: I kveld kjører du til svogeren din.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu menyetir ke rumah saudara iparmu.
translations.sv: Ikväll kör du till din svåger.
translations.ro: În seara asta conduci până la casa cumnatului tău.
translations.cs: Dnes večer jedeš k svému švagrovi.
translations.da: I aften kører du hjem til din svoger.
translations.ja: 今夜は義理の兄の家まで運転して行く。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Preposition indicating destination/location relative to a person’s place.
Possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun; introduces the NP object of the preposition.
Compound common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'chez'.
Demonstrative determiner; forms a temporal NP with 'soir'.
Common noun (masculine singular); temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.
